title: dupatya erigeron
intro: Dupatya erigeron, also known as Fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that belongs to the genus Erigeron. Traditionally, Dupatya erigeron has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural remedy to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic due to its tannin and sesquiterpene content. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including alleviating menstrual cramps, soothing coughs, and supporting the immune system. Dupatya erigeron can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in homeopathy and aromatherapy.
